text.title: RAG Canary Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the rollout plan, per-step gate result, online-quality event, and rollback receipt.

field.name: plan.target_version
field.notes: immutable prompt + retriever + reranker config id

forbidden.pattern: plan.steps with percent skipping the 1/5/25/100 curve
plan.online_quality.sample_rate outside 2-20% (too thin to score reliably, or too expensive)
plan.kill_switch.criteria fewer than 4 (must cover quality, hallucination, latency, error rate)
step promoted before golden_eval pass OR before min_samples reached
online_quality.floor_composite_score lower than baseline minus 10% (floor is too lax to detect quality drops)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Extend a step's hold when quality data is inconclusive; never shorten.
Drop sampling rate to the lower bound (2%) at the 100% step to control cost, provided the absolute sample count remains above 1000/hour.
Add additional kill-switch criteria for feature-specific signals (e.g. tool-use failure rate for tool-augmented RAG).

list.item: Golden eval thresholds set and committed before rollout
Online quality rubric and floor pre-committed
Kill-switch criteria cover quality, hallucination, latency, error rate
Rollback path rehearsed within the last quarter
Rollback receipt template captures completion time
